description: Legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps. Deutsche Mark and legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro also reported here. Commemorative coins above face value, gold coins and gold bullion → HV11/176 Others. Sub-items: HV12/011 Domestic legal tender, HV12/048 Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark.

Cash in hand (Item 010): legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps; Deutsche Mark and legacy currencies of other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also reported here; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins and gold bullion → HV11/176. Balances with central banks (Item 020): only those balances readily available at all times including foreign currency overnight balances with the central banks of all countries in which the reporting institution is established; other balances such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from sale and repurchase transactions, and time deposits are to be shown under HV11/061.

Only balances readily available at all times, including foreign currency overnight balances with central banks of all countries in which the reporting bank is established. Other balances (overnight deposits at Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from repurchase transactions, time deposits) → HV11/061. Sub-item of HV11/011 Barreserve aggregate.

Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments issued by public bodies that have been discounted and are eligible for refinancing with the central banks of the countries in which the reporting bank is established, with original maturity not exceeding one year (Item 040). Debt instruments of public bodies failing these conditions are to be shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) or HV11/082 (Bonds and notes) if they are negotiable, and under HV11/071 (Loans and advances to non-banks) if they are not. Public bodies include government bodies, their special funds and other off-budget entities. Includes instruments eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank (Item 041) and those eligible with central banks of other establishment countries (Item 042).

Debt instruments of public bodies eligible for central bank refinancing other than treasury bills reported under HV11/021, and longer-dated public-sector instruments not eligible for refinancing with central banks. Short-term instruments of public bodies that do not meet the maturity condition of HV11/021 are shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) if negotiable. Longer-dated negotiable public-sector bonds are shown under HV11/082 (Bonds and notes). Non-negotiable instruments → HV11/071. This item captures the residual public-sector debt instrument positions not classified elsewhere in the HV11 form.

name_de: Schatzwechsel und ähnliche refinanzierbare Schuldtitel öffentlicher Stellen
description: Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar public-body instruments, discounted, eligible for central bank refinancing, original maturity ≤ 1 year. Non-qualifying instruments → HV11/081 or HV11/082 if negotiable, or HV11/071 if not. Sub-items: HV12/041 (Bundesbank) and HV12/042 (other establishment-country central banks).

Bills held in portfolio eligible for central bank refinancing, other than bills for collection. Bills not discounted and credited to customers, collateral bills, and instalment sales bills not discounted are not reported here. Sub-item: HV12/052.

name_en: Loans and advances to banks (MFIs) — total
description: Aggregate of all loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks from banking transactions (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/061 and bills from banks HV11/062.

All types of loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks arising from banking transactions, including bills accepted from banks other than those recorded under Item 050 (bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 060/061). Also includes: claims from genuine repurchase transactions; registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable certificates held vis-à-vis banks; registered participation certificates and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates; claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank from overnight deposits, time deposits and securities repurchase agreements (other than the readily available balances of HV11/020), as well as balances and foreign currency balances with central banks of establishment countries that are not readily available at all times; debit balances in clearing accounts for banks; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; and amounts saved under savings contracts with building and loan associations. Transmitted loans are recorded here if transmitted to an intermediary bank which lends the funds on in its own name. Redemption claims from securities and precious metal loans are not to be shown here.

name_en: Bills received from banks (other than under item 050)
name_de: Wechsel die von Banken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst)
description: Bills discounted without recourse accepted from banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/060.

name_en: Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs) — total
description: Aggregate of all loans and advances to non-banks (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/071 and bills from non-banks HV11/072.

All types of assets constituting loans and advances to domestic and foreign non-banks, other than bills within the meaning of Item 050 (Bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 070/071). Includes: registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities and certificates, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable bearer money market paper, registered and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates and other repayable securitised participation rights; claims from genuine repurchase transactions; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; trade receivables from own trading in goods; claims from returned cheques and redrafted bills; loans backed by bills not discounted and credited to borrowers; financial leasing claims. Claims from borrower's note transactions (Schuldscheingeschäfte or Teilschuldscheingeschäfte) are shown here depending on the obligor. Only the total amount of loans outstanding is to be recorded — not the total amount of lending commitments. Transmitted loans passed to an intermediary bank → HV11/061.

name_en: Bills received from non-banks (other than under item 050)
name_de: Wechsel die von Nichtbanken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst)
description: Bills discounted without recourse accepted from non-banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/070.

Bonds and notes (Item 082): if negotiable, includes fixed interest bearer debt securities, order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes (Kassenobligationen) and Debt Register claims; interest coupons received before maturity or tradable separately; securities pledged to the Deutsche Bundesbank as collateral for open market and overnight loans; perpetual bonds. Covers government bonds (including Bundesschatzanweisungen and Schätze), state government, local government, corporate bonds and bank debt securities including Pfandbriefe. Zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds tied to index or interbank rates and asset-backed securities are also deemed fixed interest securities. Negotiable certificates (structured bonds, participation certificates, index-linked bonds) are included if they are debt securities under Section 793 German Civil Code. Money market paper (Item 081): negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) other than those issued by public bodies falling under Item 040, with original maturity up to and including one year. ECB debt securities (Item 079) are also included.

Negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) with original maturity ≤ 1 year, other than public-body instruments under HV11/040. ECB debt securities (HV12/079) included here. Sub-item of HV11/080.

Fixed interest bearer and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes, Debt Register claims, perpetual bonds, zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds, ABS, and negotiable structured certificates. Sub-item of HV11/080. Sub-items: HV12/084 Floating rate notes, HV12/085 Zero coupon bonds, HV12/086 Foreign currency bonds.

name_de: Aktien und andere nicht festverzinsliche Wertpapiere
description: Shares and other variable-yield securities other than those recorded under HV11/100 (Participating interests) or HV11/110 (Shares in affiliated enterprises). Includes: temporary stock certificates, subscription rights, mutual fund shares (including property fund certificates issued by open-ended real estate funds), warrants, dividend coupons, negotiable bearer or order participation certificates and other variable yield securities provided they are listed on a stock exchange. Dividend coupons received before maturities are also included. Repurchased options on own securities are to be deducted from liability item HV21/234. Short sales of securities not held on the balance sheet result in negative amounts.

Participating interests and amounts paid up on cooperative society shares (Item 100). Includes ownership interests not evidenced by securities: shares in private limited companies, participating interests held as a personally liable partner in general partnerships, limited partnerships, limited companies with one or more general partners (Kommanditgesellschaften auf Aktien, KGaA), shares held by limited partners, and participating interests of silent partners qualifying as balance sheet equity. Shares in incorporated enterprises whose nominal values in the aggregate exceed one-fifth of the nominal capital of the enterprise are deemed to be participating interests in cases of doubt. Amounts paid up on cooperative society shares are included. For participating interests in affiliated enterprises see HV11/110.

Shares in affiliated enterprises including ownership interests not evidenced by securities (Item 110). These are to be shown here even if they constitute participating interests. Covers all interests in domestic and foreign subsidiaries and other affiliated enterprises where the reporting institution exercises controlling influence.

Assets which the reporting institution administers in its own name but on behalf of third parties (Item 120). The amounts shown under HV11/120 and HV21/240 must tally. Comprises: fiduciary loans (Item 121) — loans recorded under HV11/061 or HV11/071 to the extent they relate to banks or non-banks respectively, classified by obligor; securities managed on a fiduciary basis (Item 122) — shares and other variable yield securities as well as negotiable debt instruments held in the bank's own name but on behalf of third parties (non-negotiable debt instruments and other fixed income securities → HV11/123); other fiduciary assets (Item 123) — e.g. participating interests and land and buildings managed on a fiduciary basis. Securities kept in safe custody for customers as part of safe custody business are not deemed to be securities managed on a fiduciary basis.
Loans within fiduciary assets (HV11/120) relating to banks (per HV11/061) or non-banks (HV11/071) classified by obligor. Sub-item of HV11/120.

name_en: Securities managed on a fiduciary basis
description: Shares and negotiable debt instruments held in bank's own name on behalf of third parties. Non-negotiable debt instruments → HV11/123. Sub-item of HV11/120.
Participating interests, land and buildings, and non-negotiable fixed income securities managed on fiduciary basis. Sub-item of HV11/120.

Equalisation claims on general government including debt securities resulting from conversion of equalisation claims (Item 130). Equalisation claims on the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund are to be recorded here. Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created as a result of the conversion of equalisation claims are also to be included irrespective of whether the reporting institution obtained the debt securities as a result of converting its own equalisation claims or bought them from another institution or a foreign trade enterprise. The sub-item debt securities resulting from the conversion of equalisation claims (Item 131) is to be shown separately.

name_en: Debt securities from conversion of equalisation claims
name_de: Schuldverschreibungen aus dem Umtausch von Ausgleichsforderungen
description: Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created by converting equalisation claims. Sub-item of HV11/130.

Intangible assets are included as a component of HV11/176 (Others) in the BISTA guidelines. Item 176 includes: intangible assets such as purchased goodwill and as a general rule computer software; internally generated intangible fixed assets; internally generated industrial and similar rights and assets; purchased concessions, industrial and similar rights and assets, and licences in such rights and assets; and goodwill. Reported at cost less accumulated amortisation. These assets are not to be included under Item 140 (Tangible assets) or any other dedicated balance sheet item.

Tangible assets (Item 140): land and buildings and furniture and equipment provided that they constitute fixed assets. Intangible assets and current assets — e.g. real estate acquired as a safeguard against loan losses if held by the reporting institution for a period of not more than five years — are not to be shown here but under HV11/176 (Others). Includes real estate holdings (Item 141 of which: Immobilienbestände) — dwellings, other buildings and structures (both existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents including real estate for own use.

Subscribed capital unpaid (Item 150): amounts which shareholders have subscribed to the capital of the reporting institution that have been called but not yet paid in cash. Recorded as an asset when the payment obligation is formally established. For the corresponding liability-side counterpart (gross subscribed capital) see HV21/311.

name_de: Nennbetrag der eigenen Aktien oder Anteile
description: Nominal value of own shares (HV11/160). For no-par stock: accounting par value = issued capital divided by number of shares issued.

Only those assets which cannot or cannot yet be assigned to another item are to be included (Item 170). Comprises: accrued interest on asset items calculated in connection with preparation of the annual accounts; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins (even if legal tender), gold bullion and delivery claims on precious metal accounts; participation rights not evidenced by securities and not repayable; options not evidenced by securities and resulting from option dealings (paid option prices) as well as cover and adjustment payments for open futures market positions (security deposits, initial margins and variation margins paid) — shown separately under HV12/177; working capital supplied to foreign branches — HV12/188; stock on hand of credit cooperatives trading in goods; land and buildings acquired as a safeguard against loan losses held for not more than five years; derivative financial instruments in the trading portfolio with positive fair values within the meaning of Section 340e(3) HGB — shown separately under HV12/186; currency conversion differential — HV12/187; prepaid expenses — HV12/184; advance tax payments — HV12/185; intangible assets (purchased goodwill and computer software as a general rule); and any other assets that cannot be assigned to another item.

name_en: Cheques and items received for collection
name_de: Schecks fällige Schuldverschreibungen Zins- und Dividendenscheine sowie zum Einzug erhaltene Papiere
description: Cheques, matured debt securities, interest and dividend coupons, and other items received for collection that must be presented within 30 days and already credited to the customer. Sub-item of HV11/170.
Assets held as lessor under leasing agreements, unless financial leasing (→ HV11/071). Sub-item of HV11/170.

name_en: Prepayments for savings bonds and similar discount papers
name_de: Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten für Sparbriefe und ähnliche Abzinsungspapiere
description: Balancing items from discounted savings bonds and similar discount paper issued at nominal value under liabilities. Sub-item of HV11/170.

name_en: Credit balance on items in process of settlement
description: Balance on items in process of settlement if asset items exceed liability items. Sub-item of HV11/170.

Tax refund claims (Item 185): as well as deferred tax assets pursuant to Section 274 of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch), this item should also be used to record other tax assets arising from prepayments in anticipation of the tax assessment date. Payments to the tax office that are recognised as an expense in profit or loss should continue to be reported in the balance of the expense and income accounts (HV11/175 and HV21/325 respectively) and not in this item.

Prepaid expenses unless recorded under HV11/173 (Item 184): expenditures paid before the reporting date but attributable to a future accounting period. Item 173 (Prepayments and accrued income for savings bonds and similar discount papers): any balancing items deriving from discounted savings bonds and similar discount paper issued are to be recorded here if they are shown at nominal value under liabilities; the amounts ascertained for the most recent annual accounts plus the balancing items formed since then for newly issued paper may be used; such paper at the issue amount plus accrued interest may also be used.
Sum of all HV11 balance sheet asset items.
Only euro banknotes and coins and legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro. Sub-item of HV11/010 Cash in hand.

name_en: Treasury bills eligible for refinancing with Deutsche Bundesbank
name_de: Schatzwechsel refinanzierbar bei der Deutschen Bundesbank
description: Public-body debt instruments eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank. Instruments eligible with both Bundesbank and other central banks → here only. Sub-item of HV11/040.

name_en: Treasury bills eligible for refinancing with other establishment-country central banks
name_de: Schatzwechsel refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsländern
description: Public-body debt instruments eligible for refinancing not with the Bundesbank but with central banks in other countries in which the reporting bank is established. Sub-item of HV11/040.

name_en: Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark
description: Banknotes and coins denominated in Deutsche Mark reported under HV11/010 and HV12/011 (if accepted in exchange for euro). Memo sub-item.

name_en: Bills eligible for refinancing with other establishment-country central banks
name_de: Wechsel refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsländern
description: Bills eligible for refinancing not with the Bundesbank but with central banks in other countries in which the reporting bank is established. Sub-item of HV11/050.
ECB debt securities. Included in and shown separately within HV11/081 Money market paper.
Repurchased own negotiable debt securities (subordinated and non-subordinated). Non-negotiable own securities deducted from HV21/231, HV21/232 or HV21/280. Sub-item of HV11/080.
Floating rate notes under HV11/082 whose interest rate has not been fixed for entire maturity. Foreign currency floating rate notes also in HV12/086. Sub-item of HV11/082.
Securities under HV11/082 on which interest is paid only on redemption. Book value = purchase price plus accrued interest. Stripped bonds excluded. Sub-item of HV11/082.

Bonds not denominated in euro, ECU, Deutsche Mark or legacy euro-area currencies. Foreign currency floating rate notes (HV12/084) and foreign currency zero coupon bonds (HV12/085) also shown here. Sub-item of HV11/082.

name_en: Nominal value of participating interests in domestic banks (MFIs)
name_de: Nennbetrag der Beteiligungen an inländischen Banken einschließlich Geschäftsguthaben bei Kreditgenossenschaften
description: Total nominal value of participating interests/shares in affiliated domestic banks from HV11/100 and HV11/110. For no-par stock: accounting par value used.
Dwellings, other buildings and structures (existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents, including real estate for own use. Sub-item of HV11/140.

name_en: Options and futures market position payments (assets)
description: Option premiums paid and variation margins for non-trading-portfolio derivatives; initial margins for all unsettled derivatives. Sub-item of HV11/176 Others.
Calculated and booked accrued interest on loans. Negative interest → HV12/189. Sub-item of HV11/176 Others.

name_en: Claims underlying traditional securitisations — removal originator and servicer
name_de: Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen mit Bilanzabgang Originator und Servicer
description: Book value of ABS underlying claims where institution sold with derecognition and manages as servicer (true sale). Synthetic transactions excluded. Sub-item of HV11/176.

name_en: Claims underlying traditional securitisations — servicer only not originator
name_de: Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen kein Originator nur Servicer
description: Book value of ABS underlying claims managed as servicer where institution is not the originator. Sub-item of HV11/176.

name_en: Claims underlying traditional securitisations — no removal originator
name_de: Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen ohne Bilanzabgang Originator
description: Book value of ABS underlying claims where institution is originator but no balance sheet derecognition (on-balance true sale). Sub-item of HV11/176.
Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities on assets side. Negative interest → HV12/190. Sub-item of HV11/176.
Expenditures paid before reporting date but attributable to future period, unless reported under HV11/173. Sub-item of HV11/176.
Deferred tax assets (Section 274 HGB) and other tax assets from prepayments ahead of tax assessment. Sub-item of HV11/176.

name_en: Derivative financial instruments in trading portfolio (positive value)
description: Trading portfolio derivatives with positive fair value (Section 340e(3) HGB) and option premiums paid. Measured at fair value excluding accrued interest (→ HV12/198). Sub-item of HV11/176.
Differences from converting foreign currency assets into euro at reporting date exchange rate. Sub-item of HV11/176.
Working capital supplied to legally dependent foreign branches. Only for institutions with legally dependent branches abroad. Sub-item of HV11/176.
Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on loans. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV12/178.

name_de: Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Wertpapier Aktiva
description: Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on securities on assets side. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV12/183.

name_en: Bills protested and cheques unpaid during reporting month
name_de: Im Berichtsmonat zu Protest gegebene Wechsel und nicht eingelöste Schecks
description: Bills protested by the reporting institution and cheques noted for non-payment during the reporting month (Items 192–195).
Memo item: portions of HV11/040, HV11/060, HV11/070, HV11/080 and HV11/090 attributable to the trading portfolio, reported separately.

name_en: Derivative financial instruments excluded from trading portfolio (assets)
description: Derivatives not in trading portfolio, measured at documented fair value net of accrued interest. All positive amounts here; all negative amounts → HV22/511.

name_en: Interest accrued on trading portfolio derivatives (assets)
name_de: Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands Aktiva
description: Accrued interest on trading portfolio derivatives where reported separately from HV12/186. See HV12/186.

name_en: Servicing loans — sold with removal as originator
description: Loans without securitisation sold with balance-sheet removal where institution is originator and servicer. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 1 of line 905.

name_en: Servicing loans — sold without removal as originator
description: Loans without securitisation sold without balance-sheet removal where institution is originator and servicer. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 2 of line 905.

name_en: Servicing loans — servicer only not originator
description: Loans without securitisation where institution only performs servicing without being originator. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 3 of line 905.

name_en: Trading portfolio — breakdown by asset class
description: Breakdown of trading portfolio components included in HV11/040, HV11/060, HV11/070, HV11/080 and HV11/090 (Items 700–704).

name_en: Ledger level before value adjustments — loans to banks
name_de: Buchungsstand vor Abzug EWB Forderungen an Banken
description: Ledger level for HV11/060 before deduction of specific (individual) value adjustments.

name_en: Ledger level before value adjustments — loans to non-banks
name_de: Buchungsstand vor Abzug EWB Forderungen an Nichtbanken
description: Ledger level for HV11/070 before deduction of specific (individual) value adjustments.

All liabilities to domestic or foreign banks and central banks arising from banking transactions, other than securitised liabilities (HV21/230) or subordinated liabilities (HV21/280) (Item 210). Includes: liabilities from savings bonds (other than bearer paper) and similar registered savings bonds, other registered debt securities, income bonds, premium savings bonds, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, and registered money market paper; credit balances on clearing accounts for banks; liabilities from genuine sale and repurchase transactions; liabilities to the Deutsche Bundesbank from open market loans and overnight loans taken up in the context of the marginal lending facility; liabilities to the ECB related to management of the ECB's capital and foreign reserves; syndicated loans raised — shown separately under HV22/211. Also includes, if not yet transmitted by the reporting date, interest and principal received from non-banks for administered loans. Banks with a building and loan division also record here liabilities to the legally dependent building and loan division.
Syndicated loans raised from other banks included in HV21/210. Sub-item of HV21/210.

All liabilities to domestic and foreign non-banks other than securitised liabilities (HV21/230) or subordinated liabilities (HV21/280) (Item 222). Includes: liabilities from genuine sale and repurchase transactions; order debt securities not forming part of a total issue; registered money market paper; savings bonds (other than bearer paper) and similar registered savings bonds; other registered debt securities; savings bank income bonds; premium savings bonds issued by credit cooperatives and similar registered income bonds; blocked balances and settlement balances of instalment sales financing firms; purchase coupons in circulation; credit card accounts showing a credit balance through payment or overpayment by the customer; liabilities incurred via another bank as fiduciary payments in favour of a specifically designated customer. Transmitted funds received directly from the non-bank in question → here; if received from an intermediary third bank → HV21/210. Syndicated loans taken out shown separately under HV22/223.
Funds without specified maturity satisfying Section 21(4) RechKredV. Includes Altersvermögensgesetz retirement provisions and credited government allowances. Sub-item of HV21/220.

Only those funds without a specified maturity which satisfy the requirements of Section 21(4) of the German Regulation on the Accounting of Credit Institutions (RechKredV) are to be shown as savings deposits (Item 221). Section 39(6) of the RechKredV is to be applied. Also includes retirement provisions pursuant to the German Retirement Pension Act (Altersvermögensgesetz) and credited government allowances for these provisions. Amounts saved under premium saving schemes credited to a collective account and not earmarked for drawing may be shown as savings deposits if it has been agreed that the amounts saved will later be credited to a savings account.
Syndicated loans raised from non-banks included in HV21/220. Sub-item of HV21/220.
Syndicated loans raised and included in HV21/280 Subordinated liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/280.
Syndicated loans raised and included in HV21/330 Total liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/330.

Both debt securities and debts for which non-registered transferable certificates have been issued are to be included irrespective of whether they are negotiable or not (Item 230). Subordinated securitised liabilities → HV21/280. Repurchased non-negotiable own debt securities deducted at the value at which they are carried on the liability side. Includes: debt securities in issue (Item 231) — bearer debt securities and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, irrespective of negotiability, including structured bonds, share certificates, index-linked bonds; money market paper in issue (Item 232) — only bearer or order paper forming part of a total issue with original maturity up to and including one year (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse); own acceptances and promissory notes outstanding (Item 233) — own acceptances in respect of which the institution is the first party liable and the supply of own acceptances under acceptance credits; and other securitised liabilities (Item 234) — warrants evidenced by securities not bearer debt securities under Section 793 German Civil Code.

Bearer debt securities and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, irrespective of negotiability. Includes structured bonds, share certificates, index-linked bonds. Zero coupon bonds at issue value. Sub-item of HV21/230.
Bearer or order paper forming part of a total issue with original maturity ≤ 1 year (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse). Sub-item of HV21/230.

name_en: Own acceptances and promissory notes outstanding
name_de: Eigene Akzepte und Solawechsel im Umlauf
description: Own acceptances where institution is first party liable and supply under acceptance credits. Sub-item of HV21/230.
Warrants evidenced by securities that are not bearer debt securities under Section 793 BGB. Sub-item of HV21/230.

Liabilities which the reporting institution has incurred in its own name but on behalf of third parties (Item 240). The amounts shown under HV21/240 and HV11/120 must tally. Includes: fiduciary loans (Item 241) — amounts shown under HV21/210 or HV21/222 relating to banks or non-banks respectively to be classified here by creditor; funds for fiduciary loans not yet transmitted by the reporting date → column 01 of Annex C1 under overnight money; securities issued on a fiduciary basis (Item 242) — debt securities issued in the bank's own name on behalf of third parties where the institution's liability to creditors is confined to due administration of proceeds and transfer of interest and redemption payments received; and other fiduciary liabilities (Item 243).
Amounts from HV21/210 or HV21/222 relating to banks or non-banks respectively classified by creditor. Sub-item of HV21/240.

name_en: Securities issued on a fiduciary basis
description: Debt securities issued in bank's own name on behalf of third parties where institution's liability is confined to due administration of proceeds. Sub-item of HV21/240.
Other liabilities incurred in own name on behalf of third parties. Sub-item of HV21/240.

Only those liabilities which cannot or cannot yet be assigned to another item are to be included (Item 320). For details see Items 321 to 326. Comprises: accrued interest on zero coupon bonds (Item 321); liability item from refinancing of lease receivables (Item 322); liabilities from transactions in goods and from trade credits obtained (Item 323); debit balance on items in the process of settlement (Item 324); debit balance on income and expenditure accounts (Item 325); and a broad residual catch-all (Item 326) including: undisclosed contingency reserves under Section 340f(1) HGB; accrued interest on liability items and on securities; amounts from traveller's cheques issued; option prices received and initial and variation margins received for outstanding financial futures contracts; accounting position credit balances on the Bundesbank giro account; amounts loaded onto prepaid cards; loaded network money amounts; liabilities not from core banking business (e.g. wage taxes, social security contributions, not yet paid dividends and profit shares); delivery obligations from precious metal accounts; deferred tax liabilities under Section 274 HGB; and derivative financial instruments in the trading portfolio with negative fair values — shown separately under HV22/505.

Deferred income (Item 338): income received before the reporting date but attributable to a future accounting period, and other deferred income. Calculated and booked accrued interest on liabilities is shown under Item 336 (Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Verbindlichkeiten); any negative interest is to be reported not here but under HV22/507. Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities stated on the liabilities side is shown under Item 337 (Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Wertpapiere); any negative interest is to be reported not here but under HV22/508.

Provisions for liabilities and charges (Item 260): includes provisions for contingent liabilities and for undrawn irrevocable credit commitments; value adjustments deriving from recourse claims arising from items HV21/341 to HV21/343; value adjustments deriving from non-capitalised assets sold with an option to repurchase in respect of which repurchase commitments have been shown under HV21/370. Notwithstanding Section 24 of the German Accounting Regulation for Credit Institutions, contingent liabilities arising from the endorsement of rediscounted bills (item HV21/341) should not be shown net of value adjustments. Bonus payments due on the expiry of current saving contracts should also be shown here even if premature withdrawal of amounts saved is not permitted under the terms of the contract.

Current tax liabilities and deferred tax liabilities. Under the BISTA guidelines, deferred tax liabilities within the meaning of Section 274 of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch) are included in Item 326 (Others) as point 21. Current tax liabilities arising from corporate income tax (Körperschaftsteuer), solidarity surcharge and trade tax (Gewerbesteuer) are shown as provisions under Item 260 (Rückstellungen) sub-item b (Steuerrückstellungen). This item captures the combined tax liability position reported on the BISTA balance sheet form.
Negotiable subordinated debt securities. Sub-item of HV21/280.
Non-negotiable subordinated debt securities. Sub-item of HV21/280. Sub-item: HV22/284 denominated in euro.

Capital represented by participation rights or comparable equity-nature capital. Includes certificates and rights not evidenced by certificates. Repurchased own participation rights deducted. Sub-item: HV22/295.

All liabilities — whether securitised or not — which in the event of winding-up or bankruptcy may be repaid only after the claims of all other creditors have been met (Item 280). Repurchased non-negotiable own subordinated paper is to be deducted at the value at which it is carried on the liability side. Liabilities deriving from drawn, called or matured but not yet paid subordinated own debt securities are still to be shown here. Includes: subordinated negotiable debt securities (Item 281); subordinated non-negotiable debt securities (Item 282); standardised small-denomination subordinated registered debt securities (Item 327) e.g. savings bonds (Vermögensbriefe) issued by the cooperative bank sector and savings bank bonds carrying such terms — amounts reported here are to be shown in Annex A2 column 7 or Annex C2 columns 01 to 03.

name_en: Fund for general banking risks — Section 340e(4) HGB amounts
description: Amounts earmarked in the Section 340g HGB fund attributable to the special item under Section 340e(4) HGB. Sub-item of HV21/300.

name_en: Fund for general banking risks — other earmarked amounts
description: Amounts earmarked in the Section 340g HGB fund that may only be released for a specific pre-defined purpose. Sub-item of HV21/300.

Capital represented by participation rights or comparable capital in the nature of equity (Item 290): to be shown as soon as it has been received by the reporting institution and irrespective of whether the participation rights are evidenced by securities, take some other form, or take the shape of rights not evidenced by certificates. Capital not in the nature of equity → HV21/230 or HV21/210 or HV21/220, or if not evidenced by securities and not repayable → HV21/326. Liabilities deriving from drawn, called or matured but not yet paid own capital evidenced by certificates are still to be shown here. Repurchased own participation rights are to be deducted. Additional regulatory tier 1 instruments (Item 295 — Instrumente des zusätzlichen aufsichtsrechtlichen Kernkapitals) are also recorded here to the extent they predominantly have the attributes of participation rights rather than a subordinated liability.
Capital subscribed by shareholders including silent partners, endowment capital, amounts on members' shares. Foreign branches show working capital and operating surplus. Sub-item of HV21/310.
Capital and revenue reserves including the Sicherheitsrücklagen of savings banks and revenue reserves of credit cooperatives. Sub-item of HV21/310.

name_en: Net loss of previous financial year and loss brought forward
name_de: Nettofehlbetrag des vorangegangenen Geschäftsjahres und Verlustvortrag
description: Net loss from previous financial year and any loss brought forward. Sub-item of HV21/310.

The Fund for general banking risks created pursuant to Section 340g of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch) is to be shown under this item (Item 300). The amounts earmarked in the fund pursuant to Section 340g HGB that are attributable to the special item pursuant to Section 340e(4) HGB are to be shown separately under Item 301. Other earmarked amounts (Item 302): amounts earmarked in the fund that may only be released for a specific pre-defined intended purpose are to be shown here.

name_en: Interest accrued on zero coupon bonds
description: Interest accruing annually on zero coupon bonds and the difference between subsequent selling price and issue price. Sub-item of HV21/320.

name_en: Liability from refinancing of lease receivables
name_de: Passivposition aus der Refinanzierung von Leasingforderungen
description: Accrual and deferral items for banks engaging in leasing for assigning future lease receivables receipts. Sub-item of HV21/320.

name_en: Liabilities from transactions in goods and trade credits
name_de: Verpflichtungen aus Warengeschäften und aufgenommenen Warenkrediten
description: Liabilities from transactions in goods and trade credits obtained. Sub-item of HV21/320.

name_en: Debit balance on items in process of settlement
description: Balance on items in process of settlement if liability items exceed asset items. Sub-item of HV21/320.

Capital items (Item 310) are to be shown according to the principle of reporting accounts as they stand irrespective of formal intermediate steps (preparation and adoption of annual financial statements). Any shortfall not covered by capital is also shown here preceded by a minus sign. Comprises: subscribed capital (Item 311) — all amounts deemed to be capital subscribed by shareholders including capital contributed by silent partners, endowment capital and amounts paid up on members' shares; domestic branches of foreign banks show working capital made available to them by their foreign head office and the operating surplus left to them; reserves (Item 312) — capital and revenue reserves including the reserve fund (Sicherheitsrücklagen) of savings banks and revenue reserves of credit cooperatives; net loss of the previous financial year and loss brought forward (Item 313); net profit of the previous financial year and profit brought forward (HV22/510); advance allocation to reserves from generated profits (HV22/509); and debit balance on income and expenditure accounts (Item 325 — Passivsaldo der Aufwands- und Ertragskonten).

Residual catch-all including undisclosed contingency reserves, accrued interest on liability items, traveller's cheques, option prices received, prepaid card amounts, deferred tax liabilities (Section 274 HGB), and trading portfolio derivatives with negative value. Sub-item of HV21/320.
Standardised small-denomination subordinated registered debt securities (e.g. savings bonds/Vermögensbriefe) included in HV21/280. Sub-item of HV21/280.

name_en: Amounts loaded on to prepaid cards
description: Balance of amounts loaded onto prepaid cards on purse clearing accounts of card issuing banks within HV21/326. Sub-item of HV21/326.
Sum of all HV21 balance sheet liability items.
Holdings of undisclosed contingency reserves pursuant to Section 340f(1) HGB. Sub-item of HV21/326.
Total of items HV21/341–HV21/343.

name_en: Contingent liabilities from endorsement of rediscounted bills
description: Endorsement liabilities arising from rediscounted bills including bills drawn by the bank. Not shown net of value adjustments (per Section 24 RechKredV). Sub-item of HV21/340.
Performance bonds, guarantee obligations, banking book credit derivatives (CDS, total return swaps), comfort letters, irrevocable letters of credit. Sub-item of HV21/340.

name_en: Assets pledged as collateral on behalf of third parties
name_de: Haftung aus der Bestellung von Sicherheiten für fremde Verbindlichkeiten
description: Assets pledged as collateral at book value for third-party liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/340.

name_en: Bills sent for collection before maturity
name_de: Aus dem Wechselbestand vor Verfall zum Einzug versandte Wechsel
description: Bills purchased, removed from bill portfolio before maturity and sent for collection.
Balance sheet total plus HV21/341, HV21/350.

name_en: Commitments from sales with option to repurchase
description: Commitments to repurchase assets sold under option-to-repurchase agreements (Items 371–373).
Commitments from guaranteeing placing or underwriting of financial instruments on a revolving basis. Back-up lines and stand-by facilities. Net of amounts actually drawn.

All irrevocable commitments that could give rise to credit risk: formal commitments to grant loans, purchase securities, provide guarantees, forward deposits, placing and underwriting for capital market paper. Net of amounts drawn.
Borrowing against collateral from HV21/210 and HV21/222 including open market loans with Bundesbank and genuine repurchase transactions (Items 401–402).

Principal amounts of financial swaps where interest and/or currency amounts are exchanged. Includes cross-currency interest rate swaps and forward swaps. Fiduciary transactions and non-recourse transactions also included (Items 411–413).
Loans administered by the bank in its own name on behalf of third parties. See HV12/215; see Annex Q1.
Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to banks within HV21/210. Savings bonds and small-denomination registered securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/210.
Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to non-banks within HV21/222. Savings bonds and small-denomination securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/222.

name_en: Memo — own acceptances and promissory notes held in portfolio
name_de: nachrichtlich Eigener Bestand an eigenen Akzepten und Solawechseln
description: Pledged and own acceptances and promissory notes held in the bank's portfolio and still unpaid. Memo item.

name_en: Subordinated non-negotiable debt securities denominated in euro
name_de: Nachrangig begebene nicht börsenfähige Schuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend
description: Sub-item of HV21/282 denominated in euro.

name_en: Subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro
name_de: Nachrangig begebene Namensschuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend
description: Sub-item of HV21/280 subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro.
Additional tier 1 instruments that predominantly have attributes of participation rights rather than subordinated liabilities. Shown in HV21/290 and additionally here.

name_en: Option prices received and margin payments (liabilities)
description: Option premiums received and variation margins for non-trading-portfolio derivatives; initial margins for all unsettled derivatives. Sub-item of HV21/326.
Calculated and booked accrued interest on liabilities. Negative interest → HV22/507. Sub-item of HV21/326.
Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities on liabilities side. Negative interest → HV22/508. Sub-item of HV21/326.
Income received before reporting date but attributable to future period. Sub-item of HV21/326.

name_en: Interest accrued on trading portfolio derivatives (liabilities)
name_de: Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands Passiva
description: Calculated and booked accrued interest on trading portfolio derivatives. See HV22/505.
Retirement provisions (saver contributions) and credited government allowances per the German Retirement Pension Act. Sub-item within savings deposits.

name_en: Subordinated debt securities with maturities up to two years
name_de: Nachrangig begebene Schuldverschreibungen mit Laufzeit bis zwei Jahre einschließlich
description: Subordinated debt securities under HV21/280 with original maturities of up to and including two years.

name_en: Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to non-banks — maturity up to two years
name_de: Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten gegenüber Nichtbanken Laufzeit bis zwei Jahre
description: Unsecuritised subordinated liabilities to non-banks with agreed maturities or periods of notice up to and including two years under HV21/280. Sub-items: HV22/442 and HV22/443.

name_en: Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to domestic non-banks and euro-area non-banks — maturity up to two years
name_de: Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten Nichtbanken Inland und Euroraum bis zwei Jahre
description: Sub-item of HV22/441: domestic non-banks and non-banks in other euro-area Member States.

name_en: Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to non-MFI credit institutions — maturity up to two years
name_de: Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten gegenüber mindestreservepflichtigen Nicht-MFI-Kreditinstituten bis zwei Jahre
description: Sub-item of HV22/441: non-MFI credit institutions subject to minimum reserve requirements in Germany or other euro-area Member States.
Average number of employees in full-time equivalents at the reporting institution in the reference year (calendar year preceding the reporting date).
Average number of employees (headcount) at the reporting institution in the reference year.
Memo: trading portfolio components in liability items HV21/210, HV21/220 and HV21/230.

name_en: Amounts loaded on to prepaid cards denominated in euro
description: Sub-item of HV22/329: amounts loaded onto prepaid cards denominated in euro.
Loaded electronic payment units included in HV21/326, not recorded under HV22/329.

name_en: Derivative financial instruments in trading portfolio (negative value)
description: Trading portfolio derivatives with negative fair value. Counterpart to HV12/186 on assets side. Accrued interest reported separately under HV22/345.
Differences from converting foreign currency liabilities into euro at reporting date exchange rate.
Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on liabilities. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV22/336.

name_de: Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Wertpapier Passiva
description: Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on securities on liabilities side. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV22/337.

name_en: Advance allocation to reserves from generated profits
name_de: Vorwegzuführung zu den Rücklagen aus erwirtschafteten Überschüssen
description: Advance allocations to reserves from generated profits shown in other liabilities until adoption of annual accounts.

name_en: Net profit of previous financial year and profit brought forward
name_de: Nettoüberschuss des vorangegangenen Geschäftsjahres und Gewinnvortrag
description: Net profit from previous financial year (income exceeded expenditure) plus any profit brought forward, not yet included in other HV21 items.

name_en: Derivative financial instruments excluded from trading portfolio (liabilities)
description: Negative amounts for non-trading-portfolio derivatives (counterpart to HV12/197 positive amounts). Reported as positive amounts.

name_en: Covered bonds eligible for own use (Article 138 bonds)
name_de: Für den Eigengebrauch zugelassene gedeckte Schuldverschreibungen gemäß Artikel 138 EZB
description: Covered bonds retained at issuance for own holdings (Article 138 of Guideline (EU) 2015/510). Shown at internal accounting valuation (in doubt: nominal value). Memo off-balance item for commercial law purposes.

name_en: Reserves — share attributable to revenue reserves
name_de: Rücklagen Anteil auf Gewinnrücklage einschließlich Vorwegzuführungen
description: Sub-item of HV21/312: reserve fund (Sicherheitsrücklagen) of savings banks and revenue reserves of credit cooperatives. See HV21/312 and HV22/521.

name_en: Reserves — share attributable to capital reserves and other components
name_de: Rücklagen Anteil auf Kapitalrücklage und sonstige Rücklagenanteile
description: Sub-item of HV21/312: capital reserves and other reserve components not attributable to revenue reserves.
Annual metric (February BISTA reporting date) for threshold analysis determining whether reporting templates M1/M1B/M2 must be submitted. Categories 1–4 based on threshold S500 = €500 million.
Trading portfolio components in HV21/210, HV21/220 and HV21/230, recorded separately (Items 524–526).

name_en: Trading portfolio valued at settlement day
description: Financial instruments in the trading portfolio also reported at repayment amounts pursuant to Section 253(1) sentence 2 HGB (Items 624–625).
